mapper.select: select a.uuid as uuid, c.uuid as drawUuid, b.uuid as userUuid, b.name as userName, a.remark as remark, a.create_time as createTime from nexus_draw_comment a inner join nexus_user b on a.user_id = b.id inner join nexus_draw c on c.id = a.draw_id where a.draw_id = #{drawId} and a.is_deleted = false order by a.id asc
